_comment: Manually curated exclusion list for the ateji candidate engine: kanji whose dominant meaning is death, disease, crime, curse or another clearly inauspicious concept. Seeded from a keyword scan of KANJIDIC2 English meanings, then hand-reviewed to drop false positives (e.g. common/neutral kanji that only had a stray secondary gloss like 'die' as in a dice/mould sense, or characters like 武/戦/兵 whose primary sense is warrior/martial and are common, welcome name components). Extend this list over time rather than relying purely on automated keyword matching.
